description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a single cutaway design, featuring a dark, glossy finish and metallic hardware. The body is contoured and appears to be made of wood, with a visible pickguard and two control knobs on the lower bout. The neck is straight and fitted with six tuning pegs on the headstock, which is angled and features a classic three-per-side tuner arrangement. The bridge and pickup area are metallic, with a visible humbucker pickup near the bridge and another pickup in the neck position. The guitar's surface is smooth and reflective, with subtle textural details on the body and hardware. The overall design is modern yet reminiscent of iconic electric guitars used in urban music scenes.
description: A glossy, dark-finished electric guitar with metallic hardware, dual pickups, and a classic single cutaway body. It features a smooth, contoured shape and a six-tuner headstock.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the smooth, dark back of the guitar body and the neck extending to the headstock.
description_view_1: Edge view highlighting the guitar's thickness, the contour of the body, and the side profile of the neck and headstock.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the pickguard, pickups, control knobs, and the full fretboard with tuning pegs.
description_view_3: Opposite edge view focusing on the side profile of the neck, headstock, and the body’s edge contours.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with three tuning pegs per side, no visible logo, classic electric guitar shape
